# Support Ticket Module LLM Guide

Purpose: reusable prebuilt support-ticket logic for microservices.sh templates.
Tenant-scoped tickets (open -> pending -> resolved -> closed) with priority and
assignment, per-tenant ticket numbers, comments, attachment metadata, and public
follow-up share tokens. Powers the ERP/help-desk template surface.

Entry points:
- `src/index.ts` exports the safe public surface.
- `src/use-cases/` contains framework-neutral behavior: createTicket, getTicket,
  listTickets, updateTicket, addTicketComment, listTicketThread, attachTicketFile,
  createTicketShareToken, listTicketShareTokens, revokeTicketShareToken,
  resolveTicketShareToken.
- `src/ports/` defines the `TicketStore` repository interface.
- `src/adapters/` contains Cloudflare D1 and memory `TicketStore` implementations.
- `src/meta.ts` builds the Result envelope Meta (correlationId threading, Plan 25 section 4).
- `migrations/0001_support_ticket.sql` owns the base tickets table and domain_events.
- `migrations/0002_ticket_thread_share_tokens.sql` adds ticket numbers, ticket
  sequences, comments, attachment metadata, and share tokens.
- `schemas/` and `openapi.json` describe API-facing contracts.
- `module.json` is the machine-readable module manifest.

Model:
- Entity: Ticket { id, tenantId, ticketNumber, subject, description, status, priority,
  requesterEmail, assigneeId, createdAt, updatedAt }.
- Entity: TicketComment { id, tenantId, ticketId, authorType, authorName,
  authorEmail, content, isInternal, createdAt }.
- Entity: TicketAttachment { id, tenantId, ticketId, filename, contentType,
  sizeBytes, storageKey, createdAt }.
- Entity: TicketShareToken { id, tenantId, ticketId, token, isActive, expiresAt,
  createdAt, lastAccessedAt }.
- Status enum: open | pending | resolved | closed (default open).
- Priority enum: low | normal | high | urgent (default normal).

Result + events (the point - do not remove):
- Every use case returns ok()/err() from @microservices-sh/connection-contract.
- createTicket emits support-ticket.created.
- updateTicket emits support-ticket.updated, and additionally
  support-ticket.status_changed when the status actually transitions.
- Comment, attachment, and share-token write use cases emit dedicated events.
- All listing/lookup is tenant-scoped (tenantId).

Agent rules:
- Keep ticket behavior in this module; keep app routes and UI in templates.
- Keep raw upload/R2 streaming, signed URLs, pending upload sessions, AI analyses,
  billing token usage, and WhatsApp/provider calls outside this module.
- Use `TicketStore` for persistence; never make real I/O in tests (use the memory adapter).
- Keep use cases framework-neutral (no SvelteKit/Hono imports).
- Ask before changing PII schema, migrations, external side effects, or production deploy.
